widget.name: Reelance Hub
widget.description: Integrates Kommo Salesbot with Reelance Hub to automatically send and log WhatsApp messages. Version 1.0.14.
widget.short_description: Automated WhatsApp reply delivery from Reelance Hub
widget.tour_description: Connect your Salesbot to Reelance Hub. When an agent replies from the app, the bot retrieves the text and delivers it to the client via WhatsApp automatically.
